requirement_topic.en: EWA Grid-Connection and Storage Requirements for BESS

summary.en: The Electricity and Water Authority (EWA) administers grid-connection approvals for generation and storage assets connected to Bahrain's electricity distribution network. BESS connected to EWA's network — whether for behind-the-meter, net-metering support, or utility-scale energy storage — must obtain EWA grid-connection approval. EWA technical requirements address voltage tolerance (±6% from rated voltage at point of connection), anti-islanding protection, and power quality. EWA grants broad powers to set technical and safety standards for equipment connected to its network under the 2017 Net Metering Policy framework and subsequent ministerial decisions.
summary.zh: 巴林水电局（EWA）负责对接入巴林配电网的发电和储能资产进行并网审批。接入EWA电网的BESS——无论是表后、净计量支撑还是公用事业规模储能——必须取得EWA并网批准。EWA技术要求涵盖电压容差（并网点电压偏离额定电压±6%以内）、防孤岛保护和电能质量。EWA依据2017年净计量政策框架和后续部级决定，享有为接入其电网设备制定技术和安全标准的广泛权力。
summary.zht: 巴林水電局（EWA）負責對接入巴林配電網的發電和儲能資產進行併網審批。接入EWA電網的BESS——無論是表後、淨計量支撐還是公用事業規模儲能——必須取得EWA併網批准。EWA技術要求涵蓋電壓容差（併網點電壓偏離額定電壓±6%以內）、防孤島保護和電能質量。EWA依據2017年淨計量政策框架和後續部級決定，享有為接入其電網設備制定技術和安全標準的廣泛權力。

standards_or_laws: EWA grid-connection requirements for distributed renewable energy and storage
Cabinet Resolution No. 2 of 2017 (Bahrain Net Metering Policy)

summary.en: China grid-connected BESS is governed by GB/T 36558-2023 for general technical requirements for electrochemical energy storage systems connected to power networks, and by utility interconnection agreements with Chinese provincial grid companies. China domestic utility approval procedures do not satisfy EWA grid-connection requirements in Bahrain.
summary.zh: 中国并网BESS由电化学储能系统接入电力网络通用技术要求GB/T 36558-2023和与中国省级电网公司的并网协议管理。中国国内并网审批程序不能满足巴林EWA并网要求。
summary.zht: 中國併網BESS由電化學儲能系統接入電力網絡通用技術要求GB/T 36558-2023和與中國省級電網公司的併網協議管理。中國國內併網審批程序不能滿足巴林EWA併網要求。

standards_or_laws: China provincial grid company interconnection requirements

gap.en: Apply for EWA grid-connection approval before commissioning any BESS connected to EWA's network. Engage an EWA-approved consultant and contractor. Prepare protection settings, anti-islanding documentation, power quality evidence, and single-line diagrams in English to EWA technical requirements. China domestic grid approval documentation has no standing with EWA.
gap.zh: 在调试任何接入EWA电网的BESS前申请EWA并网批准。聘用EWA认可顾问和承包商。按照EWA技术要求，以英文准备保护整定、防孤岛文件、电能质量证据和单线图。中国国内并网批准文件对EWA不具效力。
gap.zht: 在調試任何接入EWA電網的BESS前申請EWA併網批准。聘用EWA認可顧問和承包商。按照EWA技術要求，以英文準備保護整定、防孤島文件、電能質量證據和單線圖。中國國內併網批准文件對EWA不具效力。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for BESS connected to EWA's electricity distribution network; grid-connection approval required before commissioning
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for China domestic grid-connected BESS under utility interconnection regulations; procedures differ from EWA

source.publisher: Electricity and Water Authority (EWA), Kingdom of Bahrain

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EWA grid-connection approval is mandatory for any BESS connected to Bahrain's distribution network. China domestic grid approval has no standing with EWA. Engage an EWA-approved consultant early and apply through EWA's formal process before commissioning.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] EWA并网批准是接入巴林配电网的任何BESS的强制要求。中国国内并网批准对EWA不具效力。尽早聘用EWA认可顾问，并在调试前通过EWA正式程序提出申请。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] EWA併網批准是接入巴林配電網的任何BESS的強制要求。中國國內併網批准對EWA不具效力。盡早聘用EWA認可顧問，並在調試前通過EWA正式程序提出申請。
